privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic debugging scenario. The project is located at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/FinancialSystem. The target source file to fix is src/main/java/com/financial/core/TransferService.java, which contains deadlock-prone synchronized code. The main entry point is the DeadlockDemo class (com.financial.simulation.DeadlockDemo) that triggers the deadlock. The task requires identifying two stuck threads (Transfer-Worker-A and Transfer-Worker-B) and documenting them in analysis.txt, then implementing ID-based resource ordering in TransferService to prevent deadlock.
